case_title: S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. VS. PAOLO RENI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,127.76 FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. DBA MACKENZIE WAREHOUSE AS TO DEFENDANT RENI, PAOLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. DBA MACKENZIE WAREHOUSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENI, PAOLO $1,127.76 PRINCIPAL, $110.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,238.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RENI, PAOLO HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
